name: dero-mcp-server
description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server exposing DERO Stargate daemon JSON-RPC and bundled documentation to MCP clients. Vendored copy: bundled by `npm run build:mcp` in DERO Hive CLI.

localPatches: src/proof-decode.ts: stricter CBOR, integer, hash, address, and compressed-point validation
wrapperChanges: package.json and package-lock.json: private bundled wrapper, Node 22 baseline, and exact dependency pins
vendoredFrom.note: Vendored as a bundled dependency of DERO Hive CLI with the documented local patches. To update, refresh from the pinned upstream commits, preserve or rebase the patches, and rerun npm run build:mcp.
